productDisplayName: Nike Men Striped White & Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black and white striped polo T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a white ribbed collar, short sleeves with white ribbed cuffs, stitch detailing, buttoned chest placket, nike swoosh appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Get comfortable in style with this striped polo T-shirt from nike. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
